UpdateFileSystem.fsId: ID of the FileSystem to update.
UpdateFileSystem.fsName: Name of the FileSystem for easy identification. Length 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, and -_/. characters.
UpdateFileSystem.capacityQuota: Quota value after update. Omitting or setting to 0 means no custom hard limit; otherwise sets the capacity cap (min 1 GB, max 10 PB), in bytes.
